name: Crushing Blow
description: A powerful melee strike. Good signature ability for Brute creatures.

name: Mind Lash
description: A ranged psionic attack. Good signature ability for Controller or Hexer creatures.

name: Shield Wall
effect: The creature gains damage resistance 3 until the start of its next turn. Each ally adjacent to the creature also gains damage resistance 1.
description: A defensive maneuver. Good for Defender creatures.

name: Quick Strike
description: A fast melee strike with repositioning. Good signature ability for Harrier creatures.

name: Hex Bolt
description: A debilitating magical bolt. Good signature ability for Hexer creatures.

name: Retaliating Strike
trigger: A creature adjacent to this creature attacks one of its allies.
description: A reactive strike when allies are threatened. Good triggered ability for Defender creatures.

name: Rallying Cry
effect: Each target gains 10 temporary stamina and can shift 2.
description: A villain action opener that buffs allies. Good for Leader creatures.
